_comment: L0: exercises the EXISTING P2 acquisition lease-up/value-add ramp (commit 76cd18e) — inPlaceNoi below the engine's own computed stabilized NOI, valueAddMonths=12. This fixture's purpose is pinning the ramp's CURRENT behavior before any L-phase renovation/loss-to-lease code lands, since L1/L2 must compose with it without changing its output for a deal that has no reno program and no dynamic loss-to-lease fields set. Flat GPR (no unitMix) to keep the economics simple and avoid the unitMix>flat-GPR precedence rule from muddying this fixture's purpose — L1/L2's own hand-derived fixtures use unitMix separately. inPlaceNoi=300,000 is ~64% of the ~470,000 stabilized NOI the engine derives from the figures below (the ramp reads inPlaceNoi directly but computes its own stabilized NOI from the vectors — it never reads a stabilizedNoi input field, kept here purely for human readability, same convention as tests/test_proforma_modules.py).
